title: Dev-as-live: systemd dev unit running from repo build output + dev-deploy.sh (compile → overwrite live)
action: PBI-005. packaging/herdr-gateway-dev.service: systemd user unit with WorkingDirectory=<repo>, ExecStart=<repo>/target/release/herdctl (no --config, uses zero-config defaults from rrd-1), Restart=always, EnvironmentFile the herdctl.env. dev-deploy.sh: build release + web bundle + install/enable the dev unit + restart it — so each run = the repo build output is the live instance. Idempotent. README dev section documents `./dev-deploy.sh`.

truths: dev unit runs the repo build output directly (no copy)
dev-deploy.sh rebuilds + restarts so compile overwrites the live instance
prohibitions: Do not remove the prod install.sh path

trace.outcome: Dev-as-live: herdr-gateway-dev.service runs repo build output in place; dev-deploy.sh rebuild+bundle+restart makes each compile live. Installed+active, served real herdr. Committed 75dad3a.
trace.verification_evidence: dev-deploy.sh built+bundled+installed herdr-gateway-dev.service (active, running repo target/release/herdctl), /api/health proto16 herdr_up true, 7 real agents.
trace.verify_output: dev service active, runs repo build output, served real herdr 7 agents
